title: SQL Set Operators Webinar
headline: UNION, INTERSECT, EXCEPT - Finally Understand When to Use Which
subheadline: A free live session where you'll see SQL Set Operators explained with real examples, clear visuals and zero confusion - so you never mix them up again.
painPoints: You use UNION everywhere but have no idea when UNION ALL is the better choice
INTERSECT sounds like it does the same thing as a JOIN - and you can't explain the difference
EXCEPT exists somewhere in your memory, but you've never been sure when to actually use it
You avoid Set Operators entirely because the results never match what you expected
transformation: Clearly distinguish between UNION and UNION ALL and know exactly when each one applies
Understand why INTERSECT is not a JOIN - and confidently explain the difference to anyone
Know when EXCEPT is the right tool and recognise the scenarios where it saves you time
Have a simple mental framework to pick the correct Set Operator for any given situation
whatYouWillDo: Watch a live walkthrough of UNION and UNION ALL with side-by-side result comparisons on real data
See INTERSECT explained visually and compared against JOINs so the difference clicks once and for all
Follow a clear demo of EXCEPT queries and discover practical scenarios where they shine
Walk away with a set of guidelines on when to use which operator - backed by real-world use cases
prerequisites: Basic familiarity with SELECT queries is helpful. This webinar is designed to be approachable - just show up with curiosity.
whyDifferent: Every operator is explained live on real data - not abstract theory you'll forget by tomorrow
Practical use cases are demoed so you see exactly where each operator fits in real work
The difference between INTERSECT and JOINs is tackled head-on - no more silent confusion
Recordings remain available for a period so you can revisit any explanation at your own pace
Cheatsheets provided - a quick-reference guide you'll keep coming back to
Delivered in a mix of Mauritian Creole and English - designed so the concepts actually stick
Live Q&A included so your specific questions get answered on the spot

instructor.name: Mehfooz Kausmally
instructor.description: A seasoned software professional from Mauritius with over a decade of experience in the IT industry. After a successful career as a developer in multinational companies working extensively with complex databases and backend systems, Mehfooz transitioned into full-time professional coaching. He has already guided over 270 engineers across different technologies and levels - bringing real-world expertise and a practical, hands-on approach into every session.
